action.travelersbackpack.unequip_nospace: Can't add the backpack to the inventory, because there's no space for it.
action.travelersbackpack.deploy_sleeping: Can't deploy the sleeping bag! Check the surrounding area.
information.travelersbackpack.backpack_c: Your backpack has been placed at X: %s Y: %s Z: %s
information.travelersbackpack.backpack_d: There's no space for backpack. Dropping backpack item at X: %s Y: %s Z: %s
screen.travelersbackpack.retrieve_backpa: §9Back slot integration has been enabled – click the icon to retrieve your backpack and §6equip it in the back slot!
screen.travelersbackpack.equip_integrati: Integration enabled - put backpack in back slot
screen.travelersbackpack.unequip_integra: Integration enabled - take backpack from back slot
screen.travelersbackpack.open_in_hand: Open in main hand to equip backpack
screen.travelersbackpack.open_inventory: Press %s or Click to Open Inventory
screen.travelersbackpack.hide_icon: Press Shift + Right-Click to hide the icon
screen.travelersbackpack.unequip_tip: §4Unequip §fby clicking the button next to "Inventory" text in Backpack GUI
screen.travelersbackpack.hide_icon_info: Write "/tb_client hide" in chat to hide the backpack icon in inventory
screen.travelersbackpack.hidden_icon_inf: Backpack Icon Hidden, Write "/tb_client show" in chat to show it again or edit client config
screen.travelersbackpack.quick_stack_shi: §7Hold <Shift>: Quick stacks items from hotbar too
screen.travelersbackpack.settings_owner: Only the owner can change the settings
screen.travelersbackpack.settings_other_: Other player is currently changing settings...
screen.travelersbackpack.unsortable:
Enter select mode
§7Choose which slots won't be affected by sorting
§7Left click to select slot
§7Right click to unselect slot
screen.travelersbackpack.memory:
Enter select mode
§7Choose slot with item to reserve place for this item
§7Left click to select slot
§7Right click to unselect slot
screen.travelersbackpack.crafting_to_pla: Shift Click Result Into Player's Inventory
obtain.travelersbackpack.bat: Backpack obtainable in Mine shafts and Dungeons
obtain.travelersbackpack.iron_golem: Backpack obtainable in Armorer villager's chests
obtain.travelersbackpack.villager: Can only be acquired by buying it from a Librarian villager
ability.travelersbackpack.lapis: 15% chance to double the amount of incoming experience
ability.travelersbackpack.redstone: Redstone block in a form of a backpack. Provides strong Redstone signal
ability.travelersbackpack.bookshelf: Holds mighty knowledge, place around enchanting table just like the bookshelf to get higher-level enchantments!
ability.travelersbackpack.sponge: Works like sponge block and stores water in backpack tanks. It is required to have empty or not fully water filled tanks for ability to work
ability.travelersbackpack.cake: Feeds you with delicious pieces of cake until you're full and grants Regeneration for 10 seconds
ability.travelersbackpack.cactus: Acts like real-life cacti, If it's raining and above backpack is clear sky, the backpack will fill empty tanks with water over time. If you want some more water, dip yourself! The backpack can fill with water while being a block too
ability.travelersbackpack.melon: Can drop up to 3 melon slices when harvested
ability.travelersbackpack.hay: 40% chance to multiply crop drops and a 15% chance to obtain an edible crop from grass
ability.travelersbackpack.pumpkin: Staring at the Enderman no longer makes him angry
ability.travelersbackpack.creeper: If player is going to die, creates explosion which damages every creature around, granting player absorption, regeneration and fire protection effects. Ability is available every few minutes
ability.travelersbackpack.blaze: Immunity to fall damage and small fireballs sent by Blaze
ability.travelersbackpack.ghast: Ghasts see you as an ally, unless you attack them
ability.travelersbackpack.spider: Have you ever tried climbing walls?
ability.travelersbackpack.wither: Gain the power of the Wither! Grants immunity to the Wither effect and applies Wither II on hit for 3 seconds
ability.travelersbackpack.warden: Slowness II effect on hit for 2 seconds
ability.travelersbackpack.bee: Attacking creatures stings them causing poisoning, which lasts 4 seconds
ability.travelersbackpack.ocelot: If nearby hostile mob, grants Speed effect
ability.travelersbackpack.chicken: Have you ever wanted to be a chicken? No? Well, now you are! You'll lay eggs!
item.travelersbackpack.blank_upgrade_too: Shift click on a placed backpack to reset it to the leather tier – all items and upgrades will be dropped around it
item.travelersbackpack.tier_upgrade_tool: Use Leather as template and combine with %s tier Traveler's Backpack in Smithing Table to apply upgrade
item.travelersbackpack.tanks_upgrade_too: Enhances the backpack with 2 fluid tanks
item.travelersbackpack.crafting_upgrade_: Provides a crafting grid for the backpack
item.travelersbackpack.furnace_upgrade_t: Adds a furnace to the backpack
item.travelersbackpack.smoker_upgrade_to: Adds a smoker to the backpack
item.travelersbackpack.blast_furnace_upg: Adds a blast furnace to the backpack
item.travelersbackpack.pickup_upgrade_to: Allows items to be picked up from the ground and stored directly in the backpack
item.travelersbackpack.feeding_upgrade_t: Feeds the player with food from the backpack
item.travelersbackpack.refill_upgrade_to: Refills selected items from the backpack into the player's inventory
item.travelersbackpack.magnet_upgrade_to: Pulls items within %s block radius to the player
item.travelersbackpack.void_upgrade_tool: Provides a trash bin for manual item deletion and filters to automatically void items when they enter the backpack via the Pickup Upgrade or hoppers
item.travelersbackpack.upgrade_apply_too: §8The upgrade can be applied by placing it in a slot on the right side of the backpack inventory
screen.travelersbackpack.title: Backpack
screen.travelersbackpack.too_much_fluid: §9There is too much fluid in the upgrade to fit in the backpack
screen.travelersbackpack.equip_to_use: §8Equip the backpack to use the upgrade
screen.travelersbackpack.void_upgrade_tr:
Enter selection mode
§cChoose slots to delete
§cChoose tanks to drain
§7Left click to select
§7Right click to unselect
Drop trash bin to delete or click ESC to cancel
screen.travelersbackpack.filter_tag_empt: Put an item in the slot to start adding tags
screen.travelersbackpack.filter_full_nut: Eat only when player can restore full food's nutrition
screen.travelersbackpack.filter_half_nut: Eat only when player can restore at least half of food's nutrition
screen.travelersbackpack.filter_always_e: Eat when player is hungry, no matter how much food's nutrition can be restored
travelersbackpack.configuration.title: Traveler's Backpack
advancements.travelersbackpack.root.desc: Explore some lesser-known features that Traveler's Backpack has to offer
advancements.travelersbackpack.sleeping_: Craft your first sleeping bag that is required for basic backpack recipe
Obtain Standard Traveler's Backpack. Equip it in the back slot (if you are using the mod that adds one), or by clicking the Equip button in the backpack's inventory
advancements.travelersbackpack.functiona: Craft a functionality upgrade and place it in the slot on the right side of the backpack to apply it
advancements.travelersbackpack.iron_upgr: Combine Leather, Iron Tier Upgrade, and Leather Tier Backpack in Smithing Table to upgrade
advancements.travelersbackpack.gold_upgr: Combine Leather, Gold Tier Upgrade, and Iron Tier Backpack in Smithing Table to upgrade
advancements.travelersbackpack.diamond_u: Combine Leather, Diamond Tier Upgrade, and Gold Tier Backpack in Smithing Table to upgrade
advancements.travelersbackpack.netherite: Combine Leather, Netherite Tier Upgrade, and Diamond Tier Backpack in Smithing Table to upgrade
advancements.travelersbackpack.dye_backp: Combine Standard Backpack with any dye(s) in crafting table
advancements.travelersbackpack.undye_bac: Right-click with backpack in hand on Cauldron with water to clear the dye
advancements.travelersbackpack.swap_tool: Put some tools in the tool slots, then hold Z (default) to swap them with the tool in your main hand
advancements.travelersbackpack.backpack_: You can optionally use tanks while crafting basic backpack to get Fluid Tanks Upgrade. It can be applied later too
advancements.travelersbackpack.revert_cu: Place the custom backpack on the ground and Shift + Right-click it with shears to revert it to a Standard Backpack
advancements.travelersbackpack.use_sleep: Use sleeping bag by clicking button in equipped backpack screen (Click 3 Dots button if you don't see it)
advancements.travelersbackpack.change_sl: Place backpack on the ground and Shift + Right-click it with different sleeping bag to swap it
advancements.travelersbackpack.hose.desc: Equip backpack to use the hose. Hold Z (default) while holding the hose to switch modes and attached tanks
advancements.travelersbackpack.hose_spil: Spill some fluid into the world
Fill backpack tanks with lingering or splash potions and throw them into the world using hose
